Privacy

How we collect, use, and protect your information.

What we collect

  • Name and email when you contact us.
  • Standard browser and server metadata needed to serve the site.
  • Information you choose to send when you email us.
  • Conversations are stored locally in your browser. They are not sent to our servers.

How we use your data

We use your information solely to respond to inquiries, operate and secure the site, improve the project based on direct feedback, and comply with legal obligations when required.

Third-party services

palmshed sdk uses the Google Gemini API to process requests. Your messages are sent to Google's servers for processing. This website links to GitHub and Vercel. If you visit those services, their privacy policies apply.

Your rights

You may request access to your personal data, request correction or deletion, or ask what contact information we retain if you contacted us directly.

Contact

For privacy concerns, see the Contact page.

Version

This policy is version 1.0.0, last updated July 23, 2026.

Found something unexpected? Report an issue.
